construction_notes: EVP-8-HARD extra difficult negative: a plausible boolean guard edit for columns=None that keeps the original len(None) failure through an incorrect OR condition.
issue_summary: Redshift COPY generation should tolerate columns=None
patch_text:
--- a/luigi/contrib/redshift.py
+++ b/luigi/contrib/redshift.py
@@ -353,7 +353,7 @@
         """
         logger.info("Inserting file: %s", f)
         colnames = ''
-        if len(self.columns) > 0:
+        if self.columns or len(self.columns) > 0:
             colnames = ",".join([x[0] for x in self.columns])
             colnames = '({})'.format(colnames)
